title: AB 1238 Protects Consumer Freedom and Combats Costly and Unworkable Regulations That Would Ban Gas Appliances or Gas Powered Vehicles
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Many have pointed out the already troubling state of the electrical grid and its inability to handle the immense strain these regulations will bring to that grid.
A recent study by the National Association of Homebuilders put the cost of retrofitting a home for all electric appliances at $30,000 or more.
Automakers are losing money and consumers are facing massive car cost spikes as a result of the current EV mandates.
AB 1238 guards against the negative environmental impacts of gas appliance and car bans that ban backers have refused to address.
AB 1238 lays the foundation for keeping California’s energy supply reliable by providing for gas-powered options for appliances and cars.
